summary: Iteration 180: Unified Checkout Flow Testing - 15/15 backend tests passed (100%), 35/35 frontend tests passed (100%). Full 3-stage checkout flow verified: Stage 1 (Details & Order) → Stage 2 (Payment & Proof on SAME page) → Stage 3 (Confirmation). CRITICAL: Cart persists until payment proof submission, NOT at order placement.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: Created test guest orders and payment proofs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified checkout flow fully verified. Key findings: (1) /checkout page is a SINGLE PAGE with 3 stages managed by React state (stage = 'details' | 'payment' | 'done'), (2) Stage 1 shows contact form, delivery form, order summary sidebar, and 'Place Order' button with step bar showing 'Details & Order' active, (3) After clicking 'Place Order', page transitions to Stage 2 ON THE SAME URL (/checkout) - NO redirect to /payment-proof, (4) Stage 2 shows green 'Order Placed' banner with order number, bank details with copy buttons, and inline payment proof form, (5) Stage 2 step bar shows 'Payment & Proof' active, (6) Order summary sidebar persists in Stage 2 (cart items still visible), (7) CRITICAL: Cart badge in navbar STILL shows items AFTER order placement (cart NOT cleared yet), (8) After submitting payment proof in Stage 2, transitions to Stage 3 confirmation, (9) Stage 3 shows 'Order Complete', account creation CTA, and 'Continue Browsing' button, (10) Cart is cleared ONLY after payment proof submission (Stage 2 → Stage 3), NOT at order placement, (11) Standalone /payment-proof page still works for returning users (enter order number + email), (12) Unauthenticated access to /account/* redirects to /login, (13) /marketplace 'Add to Cart' buttons work correctly, (14) /cart page shows all items with quantity controls.
